name: Jalapeno Beef and Cheese Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices Cooked Roast Beef, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. To soften store bought tortillas, fold a sheet of wax paper in half and place the tortillas inside. Fold open edges up to seal the packet.
2. Microwave on high for 15 to 35 seconds.
3. Place 2 roast beef slices on each tortilla.
4. Sprinkle cheese evenly down the center of each filled tortilla.
5. Roll up the tortillas, enclosing the filling.
6. Place each filled tortilla diagonally in the center of a sheet of wax paper over the tortilla.
7. Roll the tortilla toward the corner of the wax paper.
8. Place seam-side-down on a microwave-safe plate.
9. Microwave 2 tortilla roll-ups on HIGH until cheese is melted, for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 minutes.
10. Makes 2 servings.
